dataList.name: Cosciotto Scottante e Succoso
dataList.desc: Quando infliggi [Combustion] con un'Abilità contro nemici, infliggi +3 [Combustion] Conteggio (3 volte per turno)

simpleDesc.simpleDesc: Quando infliggi [Combustion] con un'abilità, infliggi +3 [Combustion] Conteggio

dataList.name: Dry-to-the-Bone Breast
dataList.desc: Quando infliggi [Burst] con un'Abilità contro nemici, infliggi +3 [Burst] Conteggio (3 volte per turno)

dataList.name: Marinata del Tango
dataList.desc: Se la velocità dell'unità è più alta del bersaglio, guadagna +(Speed/3) Potere Scontro. (max 3)

dataList.name: Ago e Filo Contaminati
dataList.desc:
Il seguente effetto si applica sulla prima Abilità che infligge danno ai nemici.

Infliggi (damage dealt/3) [Laceration] Potenza.

dataList.name: Ago Affilato e Filo
dataList.desc: Ogni turno, la prima Abilità che infligge danni ai nemici, infligge danni fissi extra pari alla metà dei danni inflitti dall'abilità.

dataList.name: Chiave Inglese Sporca d'Olio
dataList.desc:
Le abilità contundenti infliggono +10% danni

L'ultima moneta delle abilità contundenti infligge 2 [Vibration] Potenza con il colpo. (una volta per turno)

dataList.name: Rottami Scintillanti
dataList.desc: Quando un alleato con Scudo è colpito da un nemico, riflette 3 danni fissi. (non riflette il danno se non viene subito danni allo Scudo)

dataList.name: Vino di Cervello di Granchio dei Rifiuti
dataList.desc:
Quando un alleato colpisce un nemico che ha [Burst] con un'Abilità che infligge [Burst] Potenza o Conteggio, infliggi ([Burst] Count x 1.25)% danni. (max 50%)

Quando un alleato si riprende da Vacillamento, cura 20% degli HP massimi. (2 volte per Scontro)

dataList.name: Cappello Pom-pom
dataList.desc:
A fine turno: guadagna 1 [Breath] Potenza nel prossimo turno per ogni Abilità Attacco che ha inflitto danni prima della fine del turno.

Negli Scontri Mirati: guadagna 3 [Breath] Potenza per ogni Abilità Attacco che ha inflitto danni prima della fine del turno.

dataList.name: Enorme Sacco dei Regali
dataList.desc: Inizio Turno: dà 2 [Breath], 2 [Breath] Conteggio, e 2 [Protection] all'alleato con meno HP.

dataList.name: Peluche Triste
dataList.desc:
Infligge +(absolute value of SP/1.5)% danni. (min 0%)

Quando un alleato con Abilità con Moneta Positiva si riprende da Vacillamento, cura tutti i suoi SP. (non si attive se è Corroso)

Se un alleato ha solo Abilità con Monete Negative: guadagna 3 [Paralysis] ad inizio turno.

simpleDesc.simpleDesc: Quando si recupera da Vacillamento, cura tutti gli SP

dataList.name: Black Ledger
dataList.desc:
First Turn Start of an Encounter: gain random E.G.O resources equal to the number of enemies.

If there are 4 or more Blade Lineage or Kurokumo Clan Identities participating in this Encounter(only counts Identities on the field at Encounter Start), gain E.G.O resources for the least-owned E.G.O Affinity instead.

dataList.name: Rusted Hilt
dataList.desc:
Turn Start: all allies gain 1 Slash Power Up.

Blade Lineage or Kurokumo Clan Identities gain 2 Slash Power Up instead.

dataList.name: Fractured Blade
dataList.desc:
During this Encounter: when inflicting [Laceration] Potency or 'Unique Bleed' for the first time against an enemy with an Attack Skill effect, inflict an additional +2 [Laceration] Count. (Once per Encounter)

Kurokumo Clan Identities, when inflicting damage against an enemy for the first time, inflict an additional 4 [Laceration] Potency and +4 [Laceration] Count instead.

dataList.name: Broken Blade
dataList.desc:
When an ally Critically Hits an enemy, deal an additional ([Breath] Potency/3) Pride damage.

Blade Lineage Identities, when they Critically Hit an enemy, deal an additional ([Breath] Potency/2) Pride damage instead.

simpleDesc.simpleDesc: Deal an additional ([Breath] Potency/3) Pride damage.
Deal an additional ([Breath] Potency/2) Pride damage.

dataList.name: Red Tassel
dataList.desc: If the target has 1.5 or lower Slash Resistance, Slash Resistance +0.3.

dataList.name: Sublimity
dataList.desc:
Turn Start: activates when there are 3 or more Kurokumo Clan Identities(only counts Identities on the field).

Turn Start: all allies gain 2 Slash Power Up, and deal +35% more Slash damage.

Turn Start: when a Kurokumo Clan Identity deals damage for the first time, inflict an additional 4 [Laceration] Potency and +4 [Laceration] Count. (Once per turn)

simpleDesc.simpleDesc: Gain 2 Slash Power Up and deal +35% more Slash Damage

dataList.name: Unbending
dataList.desc:
Turn Start: activates when there are 3 or more Blade Lineage Identities(only counts Identities on the field).

Turn Start: all allies gain 2 Slash Power Up, and deal +35% more Slash damage.

Turn Start: when a Blade Lineage Identity hits critically, deal additional Pride damage equal to [Breath] Potency on self.

simpleDesc.simpleDesc: Gain 2 Slash Power Up and deal +35% more Slash Damage
Deal additional Pride damage equal to [Breath] Potency on self

dataList.name: Ragged Bamboo Hat
dataList.desc:
Turn Start: activates when there are 3 or more Blade Lineage Identities(only counts Identities on the field).

All allies deal +50% more Slash damage

Blade Lineage Identities: if the ally has [Breath], Critical rate is fixed to 100%.

Blade Lineage Identities: inflict x1.5 more damage on Crit

simpleDesc.simpleDesc: Deal 1.5 times more damage on Crit

dataList.name: Old Dopo Robe
dataList.desc:
Turn Start: activates when there are 3 or more Blade Lineage Identities(only counts Identities on the field).

All allies deal +50% more Slash damage.

Blade Lineage Identities: Skill 1 gains Coin Power +1. Single-Coin Skill 1 gains Coin Power +3.

[Blade Lineage Mentor Meursault Only] 'Yield My Flesh' Skill Final Clash Power -24; 'To Claim Their Bones' Skill deals +50% damage.

simpleDesc.simpleDesc: 'Yield My Flesh' Skill Final Clash Power -24; 'To Claim Your Bones' deals +50% damage

dataList.name: Silver Watch Case
dataList.desc:
When dealing damage to an enemy with Attack Skills(except E.G.O Skills) that inflict [Vibration] Potency, Count, or Unique Tremor, deal +10% damage.

If the Skill triggered [VibrationExplosion] on the enemy for the first time this turn, inflict +2 [Vibration] Count next turn (once per turn)

dataList.name: Faded Watch Case
dataList.desc:
When Clashing with a faster enemy, Clash Power +1.

When dealing damage to a faster enemy, inflict 3 [Vibration] Potency and +2 [Vibration] Count next turn. (once per turn)

simpleDesc.simpleDesc: Inflict 3 [Vibration] Potency and +2 [Vibration] Count next turn

dataList.name: Warning Notice
dataList.desc:
Turn End: Inflict 1 [Binding] to the fastest enemy next turn. (for Abnormalities, a Part)

If the target has [Vibration] or 'Unique Tremor', inflict 2 [Binding] instead.

When an ally attacks targets with [Binding], deal +(5 + (2.5 x [Binding] value)) more damage. (max 15%)

dataList.name: Etched Clock Hands
dataList.desc:
First Turn Start of a wave: inflict (9 - current Speed) [Vibration] Potency to 3 enemies with the slowest Speed. (min. 3)

Deal +10% damage against targets with 12+ [Vibration] or 'Unique Tremor' at Turn Start.

dataList.name: Rusted Clock Hands
dataList.desc:
First Turn Start of a wave: inflict (9 - current Speed) [Vibration] Potency (min. 3) and (9 - current Speed)/2 [Vibration] Count to 1 enemy with the fastest Speed. (rounded up; for Abnormalities, a Part)

Take -10% damage from targets with 12+ [Vibration] or 'Unique Tremor' at Turn Start.

simpleDesc.simpleDesc: Inflict (9 - current Speed) [Vibration] Potency (min. 3) and (9 - current Speed)/2 [Vibration] Count

dataList.name: Chalice of Trickle-down
dataList.desc:
When an ally with Attack Skills(except E.G.O Skills) that inflict [Vibration] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Tremor' wins a Clash, inflict 2 [Vibration] Potency and +2 [Vibration] Count. (2 times per turn)

Yurodivy Identities: inflict 3 [Vibration] Potency and +3 [Vibration] Count instead (3 times per turn)

If the affected Identity Clashes against targets with higher Offense Levels, Clash Power +2; deal +20% damage when attacking after winning the Clash.

dataList.name: Prepaid Time Receipt
dataList.desc:
Deal +(5 + (2.5 x Speed difference))% damage against faster enemies with 2+ Speed difference. (max 15%)

Turn End: If an ally dealt damage with an Attack Skill (except E.G.O Skills) this turn against faster enemies with 2+ Speed difference, inflict 2 [Binding] and 1 [ResultReduction] to the enemy next turn. (once per turn)

simpleDesc.simpleDesc: Inflict 2 [Binding] and 1 [ResultReduction] to the enemy next turn

dataList.name: Pocket Watch : Type L
dataList.desc:
Turn Start: This Gift activates for the whole Encounter when 5 or more Identities have Attack Skills that apply [Vibration] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Tremor'. (except E.G.O Skills; except Backup Units)

To allies' Skill 3s that inflict [Vibration] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Tremor': Plus Coin Power +2 and deal +25% damage.
- Minus Coin Skills: Instead of gaining Plus Coin Power, gain Base Power +(8/# of Coins) (min 1; rounded down)

When an ally that inflicts [Vibration] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Tremor' triggers [Switch_Vibration] or [FusionVibration] on an enemy with Attack Skills(Including E.G.O Skills): multiply the [Vibration] Potency and Count by 1.5(only when actually Converting them into different 'Tremor' types) and inflict 5 [DefenseDown] next turn. (once per turn)

Turn Start: inflict (12 - current Speed) [Vibration] Potency (min. 6) to 3 enemies with the slowest Speed. (once per wave)

simpleDesc.simpleDesc: Skill 3 gains Coin/Base Power and deals +25% damage
Multiply [Vibration] Potency and Count by 1.5 when triggering Amplitude Conversion

dataList.name: Pocket Watch : Type E
dataList.desc:
Turn Start: This Gift activates for the whole Encounter when 5 or more Identities have Attack Skills that apply [Vibration] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Tremor' effects. (except E.G.O Skills; except Backup Units)

To allies' Skill 3s that inflict [Vibration] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Tremor': Plus Coin Power +2 and deal +25% damage.
- Minus Coin Skills: Instead of gaining Plus Coin Power, gain Base Power +(8/# of Coins) (min 1; rounded down)

When an ally that inflicts [Vibration] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Tremor' deals damage to a slower enemy with 2+ Speed difference between them: deal +([Vibration] Potency on target, max 25)% damage and inflict 2 [DefenseDown] every time the ally deals damage (max 6)

Turn Start: inflict (12 - current Speed) [Vibration] Potency (min. 6) and (12 - current Speed)/2 [Vibration] Count to 1 enemy with the fastest Speed. (rounded up; for Abnormalities, a Part; once per wave)

simpleDesc.simpleDesc: Skill 3 gains Coin/Base Power and deals +25% damage
Deal +([Vibration] Potency on target)% damage; inflict 2 [DefenseDown] every time the ally deals damage
Inflict (12 - current Speed) [Vibration] Potency (min. 3) and (9 - current Speed)/2 [Vibration] Count

dataList.name: Pocket Watch : Type Y
dataList.desc:
Turn Start: This Gift activates for the whole Encounter when 5 or more Identities have Attack Skills that apply [Vibration] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Tremor' effects. (except E.G.O Skills; except Backup Units)

To allies' Skill 3s that inflict [Vibration] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Tremor': Plus Coin Power +2 and deal +25% damage.
- Minus Coin Skills: Instead of gaining Plus Coin Power, gain Base Power +(8/# of Coins) (min 1; rounded down)

Yurodivy Identities: Skill 3 gains Coin Power +2 and deal +(25 + (sum of [Vibration] Potency and Count on target))% damage. (max 100%)

Yurodivy Identities: gain +3 [Vibration] Count at Turn Start.

simpleDesc.simpleDesc: Skill 3 gains Coin/Base Power and deals +25% damage
Skill 3 gains Coin Power +2 and deal +(25 + (sum of [Vibration] Potency and Count on target))% damage.

dataList.name: Pocket Watch : Type P
dataList.desc:
Turn Start: This Gift activates for the whole Encounter when 5 or more Identities have Attack Skills that apply [Vibration] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Tremor' effects. (except E.G.O Skills; except Backup Units)

To allies' Skill 3s that inflict [Vibration] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Tremor': Plus Coin Power +2 and deal +25% damage.
- Minus Coin Skills: Instead of gaining Plus Coin Power, gain Base Power +(8/# of Coins) (min 1; rounded down)

When an ally that inflicts [Vibration] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Tremor' Clashes against a faster enemy with 2+ Speed difference: Clash Power +2 and deal +([Vibration] Potency on target)% damage. (max 50%)

Turn Start: from slowest to fastest, the 3 slowest allies gain 5 [AttackUp], 3 [AttackUp], and 2 [AttackUp] respectively.

simpleDesc.simpleDesc: Skill 3 gains Coin/Base Power and deals +25% damage
Clash Power +2 and deal +([Vibration] Potency on target)% damage
